reasoning: Koren's primary limiter is poor lactate clearance, highlighted by the 25W drop from 5-min to 20-min power. The last lunch ride shows a low average power of 136.4W, indicating you're in a recovery phase. This workout will improve your aerobic base and fatigue resistance, both crucial for sustaining the target 220-235W during the key climb on the Alpine Loop.
